analysis_conclusion: Gemini, GPT OSS, Mistral, Qwen, and GLM all returned status=ok and schema_valid=true.
The canonical graph produced 0 primary candidate, 6 validation target(s), and 2 monitor-only item(s).
Providers aligned on a technical baseline, but user impact or incident impact is not verified. 6 validation targets remain for human review, and no primary incident candidate was promoted.
log_observations: The run used all 5,055 sanitized stream_v3_monitoring rows from 2026-05-24T11:29:00Z to 2026-06-17T00:12:45Z.
The local-first Evidence Bundle retained 1,680 grouped evidence items and 7 deterministic signals.
The provider prompt used 140 selected evidence items covering 496 occurrences (9.8% of the sanitized corpus).

Arena monitoring analysis used compact monitoring JSONL, watchdog and fast-recovery tails, exporter metrics, resource memory assessment, systemd journals, k8s event output, runtime state snapshots, and recent runtime log tails represented by evidence IDs and counts.
The monitoring-plane corpus is separated from Dell runtime evidence; shared source context is interpretation context, not incident evidence.
analysis_context.model_projection_policy: AI input used a bounded Evidence Bundle projection: top 140 high-signal evidence items; row-level raw logs stayed out of provider prompts.
source_observations: Sanitized source context was attached with source_context_sha256=669dc2f9d33ff9ab9d73f04d8c17f8718386815d0c6e536dde14b627232637d2.
Source context is interpretation context only; runtime support still has to cite Evidence Item IDs from the sanitized corpus.

review_graph_summary.summary: The e2e API analyzed a 5,055-row sanitized log corpus with 5 schema-valid real provider output(s); 5 review unit(s) had at least two provider positions while impact remains human-gated.

finding.impact: Gemini, GPT OSS, Mistral, Qwen, and GLM all returned schema-valid outputs. 0 primary candidate and 6 validation target(s) remain human-gated; incident baseline is not auto-accepted.
